name: Meat Ball Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. To make meatballs, combine all ingredients except oil in a bowl and mix thoroughly.
2. Form the mixture into balls about the size of walnuts (40-50 balls).
3. Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat. Brown the meatballs lightly.
4. In a 8-10 quart kettle, bring all chowder ingredients except Mexicorn to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, adding Mexicorn for the last 10 minutes of cooking.
6. Add the browned meat balls to the pot and stir gently.
